sizing_rule.note: Scale out of winning positions at profit milestones: exit 33.3% at +50%, 33.3% at +75%, 33.4% at target (trailing stop or breakeven). Treats profit-taking as exit discipline rather than hold-to-reversal.

source_rule_text: A trader should scale out of winning positions at predetermined profit milestones rather than holding until reversal, treating profit-taking as an exit discipline mechanic.
